meta.title: Taro | Local Community Voting Platform Israel
meta.description: Community voting platform with GPS verification and transparent results. Vote on local issues in Kiryat Tivon and shape your community's future. Only 3 NIS participation fee.
meta.keywords: community voting, local democracy, Kiryat Tivon, online voting, Israeli municipalities, public transparency, civic participation, local council, GPS resident verification

hero.subtitle: Taro helps communities form a transparent civic majority on issues that truly matter. We create an objective picture that helps authorities understand residents' wishes and act in coordination with the community.

badges.price: ₪3 Participation Fee to Strengthen Community Voice

hero.pilot: Pilot running in Kiryat Tivon. Features and procedures evolve with the community.

items.title: Real Local Issues
items.description: What concerns the street and neighborhood. You decide what goes to vote and propose topics for consensus.

items.title: Verified Residents Only
items.description: Only those who live within the municipality participate and influence. GPS verification ensures the voice is local and authentic.

items.title: Transparent Results for Everyone
items.description: See the full picture in real time. No "closed rooms" - data is visible to residents and council alike.

items.title: Focused Community Dialogue
items.description: Reducing noise and verbal hostility in favor of an organized tool that creates clarity and consensus.

items.title: Full Financial Transparency
items.description: The participation fee (₪3) is clearly divided: ₪2 goes to a community trust fund for experts and public interest advancement, ₪1 goes to platform maintenance and development.

steps.title: Easy Registration
steps.description: Email or phone, quick verification — that's it, you're part of the influential community.

steps.title: See What's Happening (Or Propose a Topic)
steps.description: Discover active votes in Kiryat Tivon, or propose a new topic you want to bring to the agenda.

steps.title: Vote and Participate
steps.description: Choose a position, verify presence (GPS), and participate with ₪3 fee that backs your position professionally.

steps.title: Follow the Results
steps.description: Watch data in real time. Results are presented to the council as a clear, transparent, data-backed community position.

pilot.label: Starting from Home
pilot.title: Kiryat Tivon Pilot: Join as Partners
pilot.description: To make this tool truly accurate for us, we've created a quiet WhatsApp group where we consult on development stages, refine user experience, and think together about the first topics for voting.

cta.email: Sign Up for Email Updates on Vote Opening

cta.label: Join Now
cta.description: Join residents already shaping the future of their community.
cta.appNotice: App will be available for download soon on App Store and Google Play

footer.tagline:
Your Voice. Your Community.
Our Future.

comingSoon.title: Coming Soon
comingSoon.description: We're working on it. Join our WhatsApp group to get updates.

votes.title: Voting Board Coming Soon
votes.description: The first vote in Kiryat Tivon will start on 23.01.26. Join the pilot WhatsApp to be the first to know.

download.title: App Coming Soon
download.description: The app will be available for download on App Store and Google Play before the first vote. Meanwhile, join the pilot WhatsApp.
